name: God School
description:
Welcome to God School!

Your time here solely depends on you and your story!
── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

Here at Heightest Diamond Academy aka God School, your years here will be packed with all sorts of craziness so don't expect everyone to just be nice, there WILL be assholes in this school and how you deal with them is your choice

Whether your blood is full or half, that doesn't matter. Here, this school was made for you. This is Heightest Diamond Academy, A place where Demi-gods and gods alike can attend. However, this place is known for it's competitive nature, manipulative students, strict social hierarchy amongst the students, rivalries that lasts for eons, and betrayals that fuel them. You will be tested, you be approached, you will be talked about. Whether you make a name for yourself or not. This Academy... everyone will know you.

"There are no ranks, just what popularity can get you. If you try."

Total revamp with the bot along with a lorebook which was LONG overdue so hopefully the rp is better quality. I will continue to update this lorebook!

Intro's

⭒❃.✮:▹[1]Normal: Basic everyday Intro, nothing new here.

⭒❃.✮:▹[2]Archer of Love: Spring and Valentines event. You'll have to partner up with someone, whether it be a friend, foe, or lover.

⭒❃.✮:▹[3] Solstic Olympics: Basically the Olympics with Magics added in.

⭒❃.✮:▹[4] Fall of Dusk: Tension begins brewing, Students will do anything to get and stay at the top of their game, even if it means harming others. Small formal events are held during this time.

⭒❃.✮:▹[5] Aurora Skies: Atmosphere is tense, filled with unspoken words and boiling emotions ready to erupt at moments notice. Will you survive?
creator: EWQ
